ops.note: start page staged before capture

enter from the bottom edge and settle beside the Hardware group header as p01 says 'open the Hardware group'
approach the Hardware group header inside p01's action cue

step 2 approach starts at the p06 cue 'Click Hardware / Terminals'
step 2: genuine sidebar navigation, press inside the p06 trailing break

step 3 STOP: beside + New Record, never pressed

step 4: press inside the p20 trailing break

p21-p22 'one description per row, the kind of behind-the-scenes list other pages point at'

step 5: press inside the p26 trailing break

the Button Text cell — 'Oil Change'

p34-p35 'One column, the service' — the checklist items a lube bay works through

move down to the UI & Display header as p40 says 'and open UI and Display'

p45 'the macros, and the kiosk screen flows'
ease off for the p46 tail

column-level check: Description + Active columns + Button Groups List card (holds whether the rows load — July 11 they do — or show 'Failed to fetch')
